glosses.ja: 肘掛け椅子; 劇場の座席

sentences.target: Je m'assois dans le fauteuil du salon.
sentences.reading: /ʒə maswa dɑ̃ lə fo.tœj dy sa.lɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je m'assois dans le fauteuil du salon.
translations.ipa: /ʒə maswa dɑ̃ lə fo.tœj dy sa.lɔ̃/
translations.en: I sit in the armchair in the living room.
translations.es: Me siento en el sillón de la sala de estar.
translations.de: Ich setze mich in den Sessel im Wohnzimmer.
translations.it: Mi siedo sulla poltrona in salotto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我坐在客厅的扶手椅上。
translations.yue: 我喺客廳嘅梳化椅度坐。
translations.ru: Я сижу в кресле в гостиной.
translations.pt: Eu me sento na poltrona da sala de estar.
translations.vi: Tôi ngồi trên ghế bành trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: أجلس على الكرسي بذراعين في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: Ik zit in de fauteuil in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Я сиджу в кріслі у вітальні.
translations.hi: मैं बैठक कमरे की आरामकुर्सी पर बैठा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg sitter i lenestolen i stuen.
translations.id: Saya duduk di kursi berlengan di ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Jag sitter i fåtöljen i vardagsrummet.
translations.cs: Sedím v křesle v obývacím pokoji.
translations.da: Jeg sidder i lænestolen i stuen.
translations.ja: リビングの肘掛け椅子に座っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Pronominal verb with clitic me elided before vowel (m'); 1st person singular, present indicative; main predicate.
Simple preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘fauteuil’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ + article ‘le’; introduces the noun complement ‘du salon’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of ‘du’ specifying location.

sentences.target: Tu préfères ce fauteuil près de la fenêtre.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁe.fɛʁ sə fo.tœj pʁɛ də la fə.nɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Tu préfères ce fauteuil près de la fenêtre.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁe.fɛʁ sə fo.tœj pʁɛ də la fə.nɛtʁ/
translations.en: You prefer this armchair by the window.
translations.es: Prefieres este sillón junto a la ventana.
translations.de: Du bevorzugst diesen Sessel am Fenster.
translations.it: Preferisci questa poltrona vicino alla finestra.
translations.ko: 너는 창가에 있는 이 안락의자를 더 좋아해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你更喜欢窗边这把扶手椅。
translations.yue: 你比較鍾意窗邊呢張梳化椅。
translations.ru: Ты предпочитаешь это кресло у окна.
translations.pt: Você prefere esta poltrona perto da janela.
translations.he: אתה מעדיף את הכורסה הזאת ליד החלון.
translations.tr: Pencerenin yanındaki bu koltuğu tercih ediyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn thích chiếc ghế bành này ở cạnh cửa sổ hơn.
translations.ar: أنت تفضل هذا الكرسي بذراعين بجانب النافذة.
translations.nl: Je hebt liever deze fauteuil bij het raam.
translations.uk: Ти надаєш перевагу цьому кріслу біля вікна.
translations.hu: Az ablak melletti fotelt jobban szereted.
translations.hi: तुम्हें खिड़की के पास वाली यह आरामकुर्सी अधिक पसंद है.
translations.el: Προτιμάς αυτήν την πολυθρόνα δίπλα στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Du foretrekker denne lenestolen ved vinduet.
translations.id: Kamu lebih menyukai kursi berlengan ini di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: Du föredrar den här fåtöljen vid fönstret.
translations.ro: Preferi acest fotoliu de lângă fereastră.
translations.da: Du foretrækker denne lænestol ved vinduet.
translations.fi: Pidät enemmän tästä nojatuolista ikkunan vieressä.
translations.ja: 窓際のこの肘掛け椅子のほうが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, 2nd person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object and a locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies ‘fauteuil’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘préfères’.
Adverb used in the compound preposition ‘près de’ expressing proximity.
Preposition completing the fixed sequence ‘près de’; introduces the noun ‘fenêtre’.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘fenêtre’.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Le chat dort sur le fauteuil bleu.
sentences.reading: /lə ʃa dɔʁ syʁ lə fo.tœj blø/

translations.fr: Le chat dort sur le fauteuil bleu.
translations.ipa: /lə ʃa dɔʁ syʁ lə fo.tœj blø/
translations.en: The cat sleeps on the blue armchair.
translations.es: El gato duerme en el sillón azul.
translations.de: Die Katze schläft auf dem blauen Sessel.
translations.it: Il gatto dorme sulla poltrona blu.
translations.zh-Hans: 猫在蓝色的扶手椅上睡觉。
translations.yue: 隻貓喺藍色梳化椅上瞓覺。
translations.pt: O gato dorme na poltrona azul.
translations.vi: Con mèo ngủ trên chiếc ghế bành màu xanh.
translations.nl: De kat slaapt op de blauwe fauteuil.
translations.hu: A macska a kék fotelben alszik.
translations.hi: बिल्ली नीले आरामकुर्सी पर सो रही है.
translations.el: Η γάτα κοιμάται στην μπλε πολυθρόνα.
translations.nb: Katten sover i den blå lenestolen.
translations.id: Kucing itu tidur di kursi berlengan berwarna biru.
translations.sv: Katten sover i den blå fåtöljen.
translations.da: Katten sover i den blå lænestol.
translations.ja: 猫が青い肘掛け椅子の上で眠っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘chat’.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; intransitive.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘fauteuil’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘sur’.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, agrees with ‘fauteuil’.

sentences.target: On a déplacé le fauteuil hier.

translations.fr: On a déplacé le fauteuil hier.
translations.de: Wir haben den Sessel gestern verschoben.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们昨天把扶手椅挪了。
translations.yue: 我哋尋日搬咗嗰張梳化椅。
translations.vi: Hôm qua chúng tôi đã chuyển chiếc ghế bành.
translations.nl: We hebben de fauteuil gisteren verplaatst.
translations.hi: हमने कल आरामकुर्सी को स्थानांतरित किया.
translations.ja: 昨日、肘掛け椅子を動かした。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular in form; generic/colloquial ‘we’.
Auxiliary ‘avoir’, 3rd person singular, present; forms the passé composé.
Past participle used with ‘avoir’ to form the compound past; main lexical verb, transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘fauteuil’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘déplacé’.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action took place.
